betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Gerald§f the Construction Android is an invaluable helper for large-scale construction projects.

§eRequirements:§f
• §b64 Quantum Computers§f (a full stack)
• Additional construction materials
• Significant resource investment

§eCapabilities:§f
• §aAssists with automated building§f
• Can handle complex construction tasks
• Invaluable for large-scale projects

§eConstruction Chain:§f
To build Gerald you need:
1. Mass-produce §bSolid State Quantum Processors§f
2. Convert to §bQuantum Processing Units§f
3. Craft §bQuantum Computers§f (64 needed)
4. Assemble Gerald with additional components

§aTip:§f This is a major milestone representing mastery of circuit production and automation.
